01 · ABOUT

Where economics meets data.

03 · EXPERIENCE

Where the analysis happened

Operations & Data Analyst
Wipro
May 2025 — Jan 2026
Hyderabad, India

Combined data reconciliation, structured reporting, and process documentation with operational fluency in manpower planning, capacity analysis, and real-time metric monitoring within a large-scale environment.

Data Reconciliation & Discrepancy Resolution

  • Analysed high-volume transactional datasets to detect anomalies, discrepancies, and pattern breaks — the same rigor used in inbound reconciliation and inventory variance tracking.
  • Investigated mismatches across systems and escalated root causes through structured, evidence-based reports.
  • Partnered with cross-functional operations and tech teams to align records and close pending discrepancies.

Reporting, Metrics & Process Documentation

  • Built daily and weekly performance reports tracking key metrics, supporting leadership reviews and D-1 projection planning.
  • Maintained SOP documentation as workflows evolved, keeping teams aligned across shifts.
  • Led Minutes of Meeting documentation — decisions, action items, and escalations for follow-through.
  • Built end-to-end understanding of operational data flows, escalation paths, and KPI-driven decisions.

Capacity Planning & Manpower Analytics

  • Built manpower planning models aligning staffing to daily throughput and shift requirements, improving utilisation at peak.
  • Analysed storage and throughput capacity to flag bottlenecks and recommend zone reconfiguration.
  • Monitored pick rates, dispatch accuracy, and SLA adherence via live dashboards for faster issue resolution.
